---
title: "cortex.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\core\engine\cortex.py"
loc: 54
complexity: 11
logic_score: 5.35
style_score: 3.82
intel_score: 8.81
overall_score: 4.11
---

## Intent
The `cortex.py` sector implements high-complexity logic focusing on Cortex, __init__, _ingest, query. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via Cortex, __init__, _ingest, query. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 5.3/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 8.8/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 22 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [re](file://re)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [typing](file://typing)
- [src.core.engine.vector](file://src.core.engine.vector)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)

### Exports
- `Cortex`
- `__init__`
- `_ingest`
- `query`
